messages.content: 当然可以，请告诉我需要翻译的内容。

以下段落，请帮我英文翻译成中文 At Epredia, our mission is personal and our culture is defined by our passion and care for our employees and our customers. We value a collaborative environment with a winning mentality that delivers operational excellence and best-in-class support to our customers on the frontline. We live and model our Values & Behaviors to inspire our people and make Epredia a world-class organization that we are all proud to claim as part of our identity and the place where we work.
在Epredia，我们的使命很个人化，并且我们的文化由我们对员工和客户的热情和关心所定义。我们重视合作的环境和胜利的心态，为一线客户提供卓越的运营和一流的支持。我们以我们的价值观和行为来生活和塑造，激励我们的员工，使Epredia成为我们自豪的世界一流组织和工作场所的一部分。
Teamwork is about all of us working better together
团队合作是我们所有人更好地协同工作的关键。
We foster employee wellbeing by integrating safety, flexibility, health, and belonging in our work envirionment.
我们通过将安全、灵活性、健康和归属感融入我们的工作环境来促进员工福祉。
We are curious and learn from different perspectives.
我们对不同的观点保持好奇心并且从中学习。
我们进行测试、学习和进化。
Great financial results lead to great things
优秀的财务业绩带来了伟大的成就。
Epredia a global precision cancer diagnostics company working to improve patient outcomes by providing groundbreaking technologies.
Epredia是一家全球精准癌症诊断公司，致力于通过提供颠覆性技术改善患者预后。
